_meta: Gauntlet harvest prompts — D2 base set + 50 register-diverse additions for corpus harvest. Constraint: no C1-C4 hinges in any prompt (no 'not', 'but', 'however', 'merely', 'just', 'only X'). Authored 2026-05-21 for the kill-the-AI-ism gauntlet.
